changes.description: RTL-SDR Blog V4 driver — stock Debian librtlsdr causes PLL not locked on R828D tuner. Setup now builds patched driver from rtlsdrblog/rtl-sdr-blog, reinstalls after dump1090

Whisper decode prefix — Hailo NPU decoder seeded with full prefix (<|startoftranscript|> <|en|> <|transcribe|> <|notimestamps|>) instead of just start token. Decoder now produces real transcriptions (28/32 tokens)
Signal meter flickering — heartbeat loop no longer emits rms:0 every 500ms, only resets on stop transition
ADS-B scan scheduler — uses eventlet.spawn instead of threading.Thread to avoid greenlet cross-thread errors
ADS-B scans only activate on Aviation presets, no longer interrupt Weather/Broadcast/Marine
NOAA Weather presets changed from wbfm to fm (narrowband FM)
Antenna guide (operations/antenna-guide.md) — element lengths, orientation diagrams, positioning, PLL troubleshooting
System diagram (operations/system-diagram.md) — physical setup, software architecture, data flow, hardware stack
Squelch & Gain tooltip info icons, satellite panel Weather-only visibility, audio auto-stop on source stop

Phase 12 complete — NOAA weather radio integration: continuous 162.550 MHz monitoring, NWS broadcast transcript parser (temperature, wind, visibility, alerts, marine forecasts), weather conditions panel UI with priority alert banners, 30s squelch-zero segmenter, weather preset
noaa_parser.py — structured NWS broadcast parser: regex extraction for temperature, wind, humidity, visibility, marine forecasts, and priority alerts (warnings/watches)
weather.js — WeatherPanel class with live conditions display, priority alert banners (pulsing red), marine forecast section, auto-refresh on weather_update Socket.IO events
Continuous capture mode — 30s audio segmenter for squelch-zero NOAA broadcasts, weather callback pipeline from transcriber to parser to UI

Phase 13 complete — NOAA APT satellite imaging: auto-scheduled pass recording for NOAA-15/19 at 137 MHz, orbital prediction with ephem + Celestrak TLEs, rtl_fm wideband FM capture at 60k sample rate, noaa-apt CLI decoding to PNG
apt_scheduler.py — TLE-based pass prediction using PyEphem, 24h lookahead, 20° minimum elevation filter, Celestrak TLE refresh (24h cache), background scheduling loop with 10-min advance notification
apt_decoder.py — APT pass recorder using rtl_fm + sox pipeline, 11025 Hz sample rate, noaa-apt CLI decode with auto-rotate, decoded PNG storage, image history tracking

satellite.js + satellite.css — SatellitePanel UI: upcoming pass list with elevation indicators, countdown timer, recording progress bar, decoded image display with click-to-expand, image history thumbnails
InputSource APT mode — enter_apt_mode/exit_apt_mode methods for exclusive SDR access during satellite passes, automatic preset restore after recording
GET /api/satellite/passes and /api/satellite/latest-image endpoints for satellite pass schedule and decoded image retrieval
Unit tests for NOAA parser (24 tests), APT scheduler (TLE parsing, pass prediction, elevation filtering), APT decoder (command construction, state management), integration test for APT pipeline
setup.sh — added ephem pip install, noaa-apt CLI install (apt or Rust build), APT directory creation (/tmp/ravensdr/apt/, static/images/apt/)
requirements.txt — added ephem>=4.1.0 for orbital mechanics
Project scaffolding — directory structure, state files, architecture docs, implementation plans
Input source abstraction — Tuner (rtl_fm) and StreamSource (ffmpeg) with auto-detection
Transcriber with faster-whisper CPU fallback (whisper-tiny, int8)
Audio router — HTTP chunked WAV streaming to browser
Flask backend — REST API routes + Socket.IO events for transcripts and signal levels
Console UI — single-page web frontend with preset selector, signal meter, audio player, transcript feed
Frequency presets for Seattle/Redmond area (weather, aviation, marine, public safety, broadcast)
Setup script (setup.sh) — system deps, venv, RTL-SDR, Hailo SDK detection
Hailo-8L NPU inference — mel.py spectrogram, encoder/decoder HEF pipeline via VDevice/InferModel API, 10s chunks, iterative decoder with repetition penalty, tokenizer decode
download_models.sh — fetches encoder/decoder HEF + token embedding npy from Hailo S3
setup.sh — hailo_platform symlink into venv, auto-download model files when Hailo NPU detected
requirements.txt — added torch, transformers dependencies for Hailo inference
Transcriber chunk size from 3s (48k samples) to 10s (160k samples) to match Hailo encoder input
AGPL-3.0 license — copyleft requiring source sharing for modifications and network use
Attributions dashboard page — full dependency table with GitHub repos, licenses, and copyright notices for all third-party projects
README updated with AGPL-3.0 license section and attributions table listing all 13+ dependencies
.nojekyll file to fix GitHub Pages serving of .state/ JSON files
Dashboard navigation — added Attributions link to all pages
Phase 10 implementation plan — ADS-B flight tracking with dump1090, callsign-to-flight correlation from Whisper transcripts, Leaflet.js map panel, single/dual dongle modes
Voice-activity audio segmentation plan — silence-boundary chunking replaces fixed 10s splits, prevents cutting words mid-utterance
Phase 11 implementation plan — inference stats dashboard with encoder/decoder timing, RTF, tokens/s, silence skip rate, frontend stats panel
Phase 8 complete — SDR disconnect detection with auto-recovery on replug, process crash auto-restart (3 retries), /api/retry endpoint, error banner with retry button in UI
Phase 11 complete — inference stats dashboard with encoder/decoder timing, RTF, tokens/s, decoder steps, chunks processed, silence skip rate in UI. GET /api/stats endpoint, periodic 5s broadcast.

Phase 12 implementation plan — NOAA weather radio integration: continuous 162.550 MHz monitoring, NWS broadcast transcript parser (temperature, wind, visibility, alerts, marine forecasts), weather panel UI with priority alert banners, squelch-zero continuous capture mode

Phase 13 implementation plan — NOAA APT satellite imaging: auto-scheduled pass recording for NOAA-15/19 at 137 MHz using ephem + Celestrak TLEs, rtl_fm capture, noaa-apt CLI decoding, satellite panel UI with pass countdown, decoded image display, and image history
